name: peckboard-chicken-coop
description: PeckBoard plugin: a 3D chicken run visualizing every live session as a bird — hens for cards, a rooster for chats, a barred hen for repeating tasks, a bantam for temp sessions, chicks for subagents.

scripts.build: node esbuild.js && extism-js dist/index.js -i src/index.d.ts -o dist/plugin.wasm
